item.title: [AI & I by Every] The AI Sandwich: Where Humans Excel in an AI World
item.description:
Speaker 1 | 00:00 - 00:03 Humans are the bread in the sandwich, and the AI is in the middle.
Speaker 2 | 00:03 - 00:24 AI is whatever you put on your sandwich. If you ship something or do something, if you want it to be your own, you cannot fully automate everything. It's like art. If you want it your own, it needs to be from you or somehow be connected. So I believe it's so important to do things you enjoy and you love.
Speaker 2 | 00:25 - 00:40 And it's very important to make it feel great b...
